frozenLiquidity.note: Validation ceremony liquidity pair — do not migrate or replace without new constitutional validation

WrapperV2.notes: Bytecode hash locked; no redeploy, no patch, no V3 on testnet without new ticket

TreasuryRuntime.integration: Treasury Intake ERC20 fee receipt + FSC-01 policy ref
TreasuryRuntime.notes: Intake verified during R746H validation; DEX does not own waterfall splits

KERL.integration: MARCO asset resolution via static registry
KERL.notes: Read-only; no writable KERL intake from DEX; collector not published via KERL

Labs.notes: Swap route types only; NARRATIVE_TRADE blocked; integration_ready_for_labs_narrative_trades: false

Signal.integration: No Signal Gateway binding to frozen wrapper routes
Signal.notes: Signal Gateway authority exists at exchange level; no chain 97 wrapper execution binding

SmartDrop.integration: No SmartDrop settlement through wrapper on testnet
SmartDrop.notes: Phase 2 — asset registry lists smartdrop capability as planned

DEX.notes: prepareCivilizationRoute hard-blocks chain 97; production studios may still use ADAPTER on some surfaces

Marketplace.notes: Blocked by missing router contract for marketplace route types

mainnetIdentityRequirements.description: When BNB Chain mainnet (56) wrapper is deployed, these behavioral and policy identities MUST match the frozen testnet implementation unless a new constitutional ticket explicitly supersedes.
mustRemainIdentical: Wrapper Solidity source semantics (MelegaSmartRouterWrapper.sol fee math and routing delegation)
Native fee path: WBNB deposit + ERC20 transfer to Treasury Intake (never plain ETH call to intake)
ERC20 fee path: safeTransfer fee to Treasury Intake before underlying router call
D87 fee schedule: BUY_MARCO 20 bps, SELL_MARCO 30 bps, STANDARD_SWAP 30 bps
Policy refs: D87_DEX_PRICING_RATIFIED and FSC-01 with identical policy ref hashes at deploy time
MARCO address equality rule for BUY_MARCO / SELL_MARCO classification
TreasuryHandoffPrepared metadata schema — no local FSC-01 waterfall execution in wrapper
LP fee separation — protocol fee distinct from LP fees
chainSpecificMayDiffer: Contract addresses (wrapper, router, treasury intake, MARCO, WBNB, pairs)
Deploy transaction hashes and block numbers

forbiddenModifications: Redeploy or upgrade Wrapper V2 on chain 97
Change fee bps, pricing ref, or treasury ref hashes in deployed wrapper
Modify MelegaSmartRouterWrapper.sol behavior for testnet without new constitutional ticket
Replace Treasury Intake address in registry without Treasury Runtime publication
Claim mainnet canonical routing from testnet freeze artifacts
Optimize, refactor, or redesign testnet wrapper paths under this freeze
Wire NARRATIVE_TRADE or marketplace routes without explicit unfreeze ticket

futureMigrationPath.testnetToMainnet: Deploy fresh wrapper on chain 56 with same bytecode semantics + mainnet immutables; run constitutional validation ceremony; publish via new registry ticket — do not promote testnet address
futureMigrationPath.testnetUnfreeze: Requires explicit constitutional ticket superseding R748; new validation certificate mandatory
futureMigrationPath.productWiring: Unblocking prepareCivilizationRoute for chain 97 is product integration, not freeze mutation — wrapper contract unchanged
futureMigrationPath.labsNarrative: Blocked until NARRATIVE_TRADE route type + wrapper entrypoint defined in separate ticket

disclaimer: Freeze manifest only. Locks chain 97 Smart Router implementation as validated. Does not activate mainnet. Does not authorize contract changes.
